title: Kiz Kulesinde Bir Facia
writer: Paul Autier, Paul Cloquemin, Muhsin Ertugrul
actors: Muhsin Ertugrul, Neyyire Neyir, Emin Belig Belli
plot: A man and his son work together as officers in a lighthouse in Istanbul. The son is bitten by a dog before his duty and as time passes by, he begins to behave strange and in the meantime women at the home begin to worry about this...
